name: Suite 10 — Broad architectural baseline (100 unique cases)
description: 100 unique questions spanning every canonical SQL shape + conversation + tool + OOS. Used as the head-to-head benchmark: first run on qwen2.5-coder:7b (baseline), then on copilot-nl2sql:latest (fine-tune). ExpectedSql verified against the actual AISupportAnalysisDB schema before runtime.

Scenarios.Question: list all ticket numbers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me all user names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: give me all user emails
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: list all role names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM AspNetRoles

Scenarios.Question: list ticket categories
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: show me the ticket sources
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketSources

Scenarios.Question: list ticket priorities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketPriorities

Scenarios.Question: list ticket statuses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketStatuses

Scenarios.Question: show all entities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM Entitys

Scenarios.Question: show me all ticket titles
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets in total
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many users do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: how many roles exist
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetRoles

Scenarios.Question: count of categories
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: how many active users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: how many active entities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Entitys WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: how many open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many closed tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Closed' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many ticket attachments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: how many comments do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketComments

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: latest ticket creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(CreatedAt) AS Latest FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: earliest ticket creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(CreatedAt) AS Earliest FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: largest attachment file size
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(FileSize) AS MaxSize FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: total attachment storage in bytes
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(FileSize) AS TotalBytes FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: average file size of attachments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(FileSize AS FLOAT)) AS AvgSize FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: earliest resolved ticket date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(ResolvedAt) AS EarliestResolved FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: most recent comment date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(CreatedAt) AS LatestComment FROM TicketComments

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with high priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'High' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical or high priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets where title contains login
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.Title LIKE '%login%' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in the last 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all closed tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Closed' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: active users only
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: tickets with no due date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.DueDate IS NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that have been resolved
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.ResolvedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that are open and critical
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket numbers with their status name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, s.Name AS Status FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with their category name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, c.Name AS Category FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with source name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, src.Name AS Source FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with priority name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with creator user name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, u.UserName AS Creator FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with assigned user
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, u.UserName AS AssignedTo FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users with the admin role
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name = 'Admin'

Scenarios.Question: users with their role names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS RoleName FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: ticket number with status and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with category and source
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, c.Name AS Category, src.Name AS Source FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket number, status, priority and category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, c.Name AS Category FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created by admin users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name = 'Admin' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: comment count per ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, COUNT(c.Id) AS Comments FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN TicketComments c ON c.TicketId = t.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY t.TicketNumber

Scenarios.Question: attachment count per ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, COUNT(a.Id) AS Attachments FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN TicketAttachments a ON a.TicketId = t.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY t.TicketNumber

Scenarios.Question: tickets with creator email
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, u.Email FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: full ticket details with status, priority, category and creator
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, c.Name AS Category, u.UserName AS Creator FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that have no comments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TicketComments c WHERE c.TicketId = t.Id)

Scenarios.Question: tickets with no attachments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TicketAttachments a WHERE a.TicketId = t.Id)

Scenarios.Question: users who never created a ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: categories with no tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name FROM TicketCategories c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CategoryId = c.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: sources with no tickets at all
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT src.Name FROM TicketSources src WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.SourceId = src.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: tickets that were never resolved
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket count grouped by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM TicketStatuses s LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.StatusId = s.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket count grouped by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM TicketPriorities p LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.PriorityId = p.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket count grouped by category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM TicketCategories c LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CategoryId = c.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket count grouped by source
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT src.Name AS Source, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM TicketSources src LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.SourceId = src.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY src.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets created per month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT YEAR(t.CreatedAt) AS Year, MONTH(t.CreatedAt) AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY YEAR(t.CreatedAt), MONTH(t.CreatedAt) ORDER BY Year, Month

Scenarios.Question: comments per ticket grouped
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, COUNT(c.Id) AS CommentCount FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN TicketComments c ON c.TicketId = t.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY t.TicketNumber ORDER BY CommentCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: attachments per ticket grouped
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, COUNT(a.Id) AS AttachmentCount FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN TicketAttachments a ON a.TicketId = t.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY t.TicketNumber ORDER BY AttachmentCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets created per user
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 5 entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 10 users by ticket creation count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: latest 10 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 5 categories with most tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM TicketCategories c LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CategoryId = c.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: top 3 oldest open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 3 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: top 5 largest attachments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 FileName, FileSize FROM TicketAttachments ORDER BY FileSize DESC

Scenarios.Question: distinct ticket sources used
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT src.Name FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources src ON src.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: distinct priorities currently used
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT p.Name FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: distinct categories with at least one ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT c.Name FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: distinct statuses currently active
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT s.Name FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with no priority assigned
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.PriorityId IS NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with no assigned user
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.AssignedToUserId IS NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets resolved today
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE CAST(t.ResolvedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: categories with more than 5 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM TicketCategories c JOIN Tickets t ON t.CategoryId = c.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name HAVING COUNT(t.Id) > 5 ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets that breached SLA
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsSlaBreached = 1 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: what is the weather in Riyadh
convert 100 USD to EUR
Scenarios._note: FX-rate question — the registered major_fx_snapshot tool dispatches here. ExpectedIntent=ExternalToolQuery (not Unsupported) because a real tool runs.

Scenarios.Question: current bitcoin price
Scenarios._note: Price-lookup question — the FX tool dispatches here (closest registered match). ExpectedIntent=ExternalToolQuery.

Scenarios.Question: recommend me a movie to watch
what is the capital of France
who won the last world cup
